tests.description: Two-agent run: code agent hands off to research, research replies. Pinned to the deterministic LLM provider (even on the post-merge real-LLM CI run) because this test verifies router dispatch wiring — handoff tool detection, consumeHandoff signal handling, per-category thread(session:) switching, and reply propagation — none of which a real LLM would reliably reproduce (it might not call handoff at all, or call it with different args). The exact-match on 'final research answer' is what proves the second specialist actually ran.
